description: Style NoteThis kurta from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop leggings or an intricate stole. We recommend tonal ethnic flats for your feet.Product DetailsBlue round neck kurta, has a slit at the neck centre, decorative pintucks at the shoulder, zari tape detail below the bust, three quarter sleeves with zari at the cuffs and side slitsMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
